raw_text: gonzalo pérez de laborda 15/12/1991 (23 y.o.) gontxip@ gmail.com +34 695726528 b1 license 2 engineer escuela técnica superior de ingenieria de bilbao double degree engineer arts et métiers paristech formation 04/2015 - present : master gaia at the alcala de henares university: master in professional development, business administration and management, finance, law, etc. 09/2014 - 01/2015 : master idi. partnership between the ensam (ecole nationale supérieure des arts et métiers, paristech) and inseec business school. international projects management, leadership, economics and history of the eu and developing countries... 09/2013 - 01/2014 : troisieme année ensam. major in aeronautics and space. aeronautical structures (mainly composites properties studies), propeller systems, products and processes in aeronautical industry. 09/2009 - 07/2013 : old plan engineer at etsib escuela técnica superior de ingenieria de bilbao, upv universidad del pais vasco (bilbao, spain). major in mechanical design. work experience 04/2015 - present : full time internship at airbus group general procurement. checking with the stakeholders the services or product needed, launching call for tenders via eproc, negotiation with international providers of the technical and commercial proposal and contractual requirements, analysis and selection of the providers, contract management (deviation sheets, change proposals...) etc. 02/2015 - 04/2015 : technical design teacher in an academy. nautical engineering and high school students. 02/2014 - 09/2014 : full time internship and final project at 12m (institut de mécanique et ingénierie, bordeaux1). subject: ways of improvement and ecoperformance of fabrication procedures by machining. environmental evaluation of the fabrication processes. 2011 - 2013 : scholar help for college students in physics, chemistry and mathematics. skills technical : simapro (lca), mathematica, solid works, matlab, eproc (airbus), sap, ansys, dominion of office languages: spanish : mother tongue english : fluid b2 and first certificate of cambridge, but higher level french : fluid, tfl 850/985 basque : advanced level (10 years) personal interests sports división de honor rugby player in getxo rugby taldea (seaons 201 1- 2012 & 2012-2013) rugby, football, table tennis.. cinema
